visualDirection: fresh, clean, brand-new residential electrical hardware only
accuracyPolicy: Generated concept art is visual inspiration only. Geometry-critical 3D assets must be modeled from this manifest and verified against terminal counts before approval.

assets.label: Standard Outlet
assets.body: white duplex receptacle, brand-new nylon/plastic face, galvanized mounting yoke

assets.label: Half-Hot Outlet
assets.body: white duplex receptacle, brand-new nylon/plastic face, galvanized mounting yoke

assets.label: GFCI Outlet
assets.body: white GFCI receptacle, brand-new nylon/plastic face, RESET and TEST button text on the front face

assets.label: Single-Pole Switch
assets.body: white toggle switch, brand-new nylon/plastic body, galvanized mounting yoke

assets.label: 3-Way Switch
assets.body: white 3-way toggle switch, brand-new nylon/plastic body, galvanized mounting yoke
assets.layoutReference: Use the attached user reference: green ground screw high on the left side/yoke, two brass traveler screws at the upper left and upper right side positions, and one black common screw at the lower right side position.

terminals.label: Ground
terminals.placement: upper left ground screw on yoke/side

assets.label: 4-Way Switch
assets.body: white 4-way toggle switch, brand-new nylon/plastic body, galvanized mounting yoke
assets.layoutReference: Use the attached user reference: two brass traveler screws across the upper left and upper right side positions, two black traveler screws across the lower left and lower right side positions, and one green ground screw low on the left side/yoke. No common screw.

terminals.label: Ground
terminals.placement: lower left ground screw on yoke/side

assets.label: Black Hot Wire
assets.body: fresh black insulated conductor with bright stripped copper ends

assets.label: Red Traveler/Hot Wire
assets.body: fresh red insulated conductor with bright stripped copper ends

assets.label: White Neutral Wire
assets.body: fresh white insulated conductor with bright stripped copper ends

assets.label: Green Ground Wire
assets.body: fresh green insulated grounding conductor with bright stripped copper ends

assets.label: Wire Nut
assets.body: brand-new yellow/orange twist-on wire connector with ribbed shell

assets.label: 2-Wire NM-B Cable
assets.body: fresh beige NM-B jacket with black, white, and bare copper grounding conductors emerging from both ends
assets.continuity: matching conductor colors are internally continuous from IN to OUT

assets.label: 3-Wire NM-B Cable
assets.body: fresh beige NM-B jacket with black, red, white, and bare copper grounding conductors emerging from both ends
assets.continuity: matching conductor colors are internally continuous from IN to OUT

assets.label: 4x4 Metal Box
assets.body: brand-new galvanized square metal electrical box with knockouts and one green ground screw

assets.label: Power Cable / Source Module
assets.body: clean training-source module for simulator power-in, not a real household installable device

assets.label: Protected Outlet Source
assets.body: clean GFCI-protected workbench outlet and cord source representation

assets.label: Plug-In Bulb
assets.body: clean small plug-in/receptacle test light asset with clear bulb and two plug blades
assets.interaction: not wireable; drag into the top or bottom receptacle of a standard, half-hot, or GFCI outlet to insert, and drag away to detach
